name: ctyun-cloud-firewall-c100
description: OctoBus package for CTYun Cloud Firewall native edition C100 read-only query APIs.

CTYun_CloudFirewallC100.CTYun_CloudFirew.description: Query CTYun Cloud Firewall C100 protection rules.

CTYun_CloudFirewallC100.CTYun_CloudFirew.name: alarm-query
